{{Missing Info|specifics=form, element, realm, second HARD}}

{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell originally belonged to Captain Planet (alias), who was extremely intelligent. The Snail Shell is able to generate unlimited power and is one of the Captain's outstanding creations.
|affct=TECH
|hard=ATK
|source=
{{Memetic Catalyst
|number=8119
|relic1=Psionic Jammer
|relic2=Runes
|relic3=Diffraction Device
|relic4=Susan's Horn
|relic5=Time Crystal
}}
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=3
|fire=0
|wind=2
|form=
|element=
|realm=
|orangehard=
}}
